* Use mermaid when creating diagrams in documentation files
* If you see long functions or methods, consider refactoring them into smaller, more manageable pieces
* Write unit tests for new features and bug fixes
* If you need to generate data in special formats like HTML, JSON or SVG, use appropriate libraries instead of building strings manually
* When making changes, make sure that everything is in sync after the change: documentation, database specification, types, code, comments, tests, configuration files.
* When creating a new runnable software version, increment the version number in the package.json file according to semantic versioning principles
